# Release draft — v1.5

Title: AI Data Shield Enterprise — v1.5

Changelog:
- Fix: Remove stray token causing runtime error "TypeScript is not defined".
- Fix: Remove unused `activeTab` permission from manifest.
- Build: Produce `DIST/` and packaged `ai-data-shield-DIST.zip` for Chrome Web Store.

Attach: `ai-data-shield-DIST.zip`

Notes for publishing:
- Confirm privacy/security checklist.
- Verify `host_permissions` are strictly necessary for supported sites.
- Screenshots updated as needed.
